human_verification.notes: Verified digital wallet operations boundary handling, source coverage, lifecycle-state logic, dependency routing, change-readiness controls, and scenario-to-ability mappings.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit wallet-operations execution, escalation, refusal, dependency routing, and completion-evidence behavior.
Required abilities across shared and execution-processing-and-fulfillment contracts are fully covered and mapped.

specialist_owned_evidence: Wallet workflow progression is tied to named wallet, token, processor, access, and change-management artifacts and system states.
Missing-record, dependency-failure, rework, and escalation conditions are explicit and reopen the exception queue instead of being glossed over.
Security approval, sponsor-bank, network, fraud, disputes, engineering, and legal boundaries route to specialized owners instead of overstating authority.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; open questions are converted into explicit escalation or tenant-fact dependencies.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation results and readiness evidence.
Pack is ready for validated specification-based deployment with defined promotion criteria for a separate retained-implementation runtime.
